title: August 30th, 2021 (2)
body:
-    04:57 pm, august 30th, 2021
i know how to teleport. i need to be able to walk next door
tags:
    -
    -
- ## daily notes
    - my five communities
        - private
        - family
            - 04:59 pm, august 30th, 2021
what to tell amber tonight
tags:
                -
                - i will sign the lease and sign up for paying at least half of the rent for the entire two years
                - i am going to look for a place to stay for at least a month
                    - i'm not ready to look beyond that right now
                - i'll keep picking noble up from school
                    - i'm not ready to work out the details now
                - my main focus is finding some breathing room so we have enough oxygen again
                    - i need it
        - professional
        - neighborhood
        - world
- ##  today's todo theme - mise en place
    - notes
        - i'm reintegrating after my arkansas trip
        - my spaces are feeling tight
        - i'm out of sync with work
            - only access is slack on desktop
            - missed last two meetings with gabe
                - set an alarm?
                - sign into google on phone
                - activate calendar alerts
    - quick list of ideas
        - inventory/stock canvases
        - make a shopping/errand list for the week
        - self
            - rearrange some foodstuffs in pantry, fridge, and freezer for my eating needs
            -  find a way to keep sustainable snacks at hand
                -  get some sustainable snacks
            -  find a way to keep sustainable drinks at hand
                -  get some sustainable drinks
            -  set reminder alarms to check in with my body
            - self-care supersedes theme. empractice this
            - set alarm to refill water
            -  set alarm for picking up noble
        - home
            -  sweet alarms for trash and recycling
            -  clean dishes
            - make bed
        - work
            -  sign into google on pc
            - sign into google on phone
            - activate calendar alerts
            - sign into slack on phone
        - studio
            - put laundry away
            - breakdown and repack bookshelf
            - finish unpacking
                - repack backpack
            - remove pandora from computer st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]up
            - automate computer st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]up in the morning
            - can i disable log in screen during st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]up
        - digital
            -  sign in to marco polo
mise en place
            - set up a theme suggestion bank
                - a random pull from this bank is the default option?
            - update daily notes with today's theme section
            -  delete phone alarms
            - put a phone plug somewhere
            - make space in gmail account
            - set up separate desktops for different workclusters. optimize to minimize clutter and clarify pathing to various destinations
        - other
    - workspace
- 12:10 pm, august 30th, 2021
lyric update
tags:
    -
    - i'd go down on a current if they let me
    - won't go up on stage, you can't make me
    - i refuse to accept that i have to
    - yeah i'm that dude but it's not a bad attitude
    - people speak in platitudes but when they point
    - my vision's instantly attracted to options right there and then
    - so when someone push, i stay clear of em
    - when they stab it's hilarious
    - cuz they're already mad i'm the airiest
    - what's scary is i'm not alone in the area
    - so i'm wary of where i am and it wears me out
    - love a blanket of fog because it reminds me to go lie down
    - i could kiss a frog in my throat cuz i now i know not to talk out loud
    - there's prince inside me trying to climb out
    - if i can just sit quietly the angels'll come right down
    - all the angles
    -
    -
- 11:35 am, august 30th, 2021
add today's tone to daily notes
tags:
    -
    -
- 09:18 am, august 30th, 2021
in my faith lyrics
tags:
    -
    - we strive not to punish people when time wobbles
    - lateness needs no explanation. it bears no investigation. it demands no judgment
    - when i punish someone else thus i am as a time tyrant
    - not as birth, life, and death that say now, now, now to syncopate their own rhythm
    - but as plague, war, and poverty whispering (in the voices of gods) huddle, huddle, huddle
    - nowhere else is safe now but here
    - no when else is safe here but now
    - when i punish myself for time wobbles i am as a m[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]yr
    - not as seed scattered, carcass rotting, star exploding shouting go, go, go
    - but as sullen spouse, inflated ego, falling empire biting their words until they pop
- 09:45 am, august 30th, 2021
lyrics
tags:
    -
    - i went from overseer to supervisor
    - that's what they call a come up
    - so come over here son i got advice for
    - you if you don't wanna be a lifer
    - act... righter
    - keep track while your trying
    - i'll come back later
    - we can review the tape then
    - you can tell me why you're not fired
    - up about the new crop
    - couldn't a done it without you
    - top to bottom
    - it's a team effort
    - i said get it you got it
    - i said i want it you got it
    - i needed something you couldn't give me
    - you died trying (to eat money)
    - i told you i'm honored
    - you stopped crying
    - st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ed laughing
    - we're both glad you got it cuz that was boss joking
    - call it a punch line
    - that's how i'm clocking crunchtime
    - docking you next time cuz this time was your one time
